changelog: Kanban board: visual ticket overview — columns by status, cards with priority, due date, and assigned agent
Kanban board: drag-and-drop to change ticket status with animated ghost thumbnail and drop placeholder
Kanban board: sort cards within columns (Newest, Priority, Due date, etc.)
Kanban board: List/Board toggle in header — preference remembered across sessions
Kanban board: mobile fallback with status dropdown on each card
Tickets: user filter dropdown replaces text input — filter by creator, assignee, or email
Notifications: card design updated — flat left border, consistent with ticket list style
